section_id: Rule on Fines for Suspended Agencies
title: Computation of Fines on Suspended Agencies
content: In addition or in lieu of the penalty of suspension of license, the Administration may impose the penalty of fine which shall be computed at P10,000.00 for every month of suspension.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
